candidates.why: Direct total top-line revenue label; identical to Net sales in the preview and is the most explicit total revenue line.
Revenue-related but clearly only a component, not total company revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not income statement revenue.
Also a valid top-line revenue label; identical to Total Revenue in the preview and useful as an alternate label across years.
Appears to be other revenue/offset item, not total sales.
Generic other revenue component, not total sales.

candidates.why: Inventory change is only one component of cost build-up and not full COGS.
